forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 54. West southwest wind around 7 mph.

forecast.name: Saturday
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy, with a high near 61. West southwest wind 7 to 12 mph.

weather_report:
In the heart of Downtown San Francisco, the night wraps itself in a soft, wispy embrace of clouds, hinting at the subtle dance of marine air that rolls in from the expansive Pacific. As darkness lingers, the temperature holds steady, a gentle 54 degrees, with a west-southwest breeze whispering through the streets, offering a slight chill to the evening air. Shadows of buildings loom mysteriously under the muted glow of streetlights, their outlines softened by the lingering haze, while glimpses of the Golden Gate Bridge remain concealed beneath an ethereal shroud.

As dawn breaks tomorrow, expect more of the same—a canvas of cloud cover draping the sky, accompanied by a modest high of around 61 degrees. The wind will pick up, dancing between 7 to 12 mph, adding a refreshing touch to the day. The marine layer may thin but will still linger, concealing the sun at times while revealing patches of blue, creating a picturesque scene that invites exploration. For those venturing outdoors, layered attire will be your ally—think a comfortable sweater over a breathable shirt, paired with light trousers to navigate the coolness of the morning and the mildness of the afternoon. Consider a thoughtful stroll through the city’s diverse neighborhoods, perhaps indulging in a quiet café tucked away in a corner, sipping something warm while watching the world awaken. All in all, it promises to be a day to savor, unfolding gently like a well-worn novel.
